name: Mike Rich
bio: Mike Rich is Chief Revenue Officer at Zscaler. He joined the company in November 2023, which is reflected in a hefty FY2024 disclosure: a $550,000 sign-on bonus, a $550,000 consulting fee for prior services, and over $37 million of new-hire equity. He was not an NEO during FY2023, so only two fiscal years are disclosed.

footnotes: Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2025 performance condition (grant-date fair value). Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion would be $6,755,520.
Non-Equity Incentive payout under the Executive Incentive Compensation Plan based on FY2025 ARR targets.

badges.detail: $550K cash sign-on plus $550K consulting fee for prior services, paid Nov 2023.

footnotes: Bonus reflects a one-time $550,000 sign-on bonus paid in November 2023 pursuant to the Rich Offer Letter.

Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2024 performance condition. Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion would be $17,034,541.
Option Awards: a stock option granted on December 1, 2023 with one-fourth vesting on his start date and the remainder monthly through November 1, 2027.
All Other Compensation reflects a $550,000 consulting fee paid in November 2023 for services rendered prior to his employment, pursuant to a consulting agreement entered in September 2023.
